title: KB Knowledge Gap
description: Emitted by kb audit and kb decay when an empirically_testable entry has no evidence chain, or when a project has an identified research blind spot. Primary consumer: deer-flow gap-dispatch loop which queues a research question and feeds the result back as deer-flow.guidance.fact.v1.

entry_id.description: UUID of the vault entry that triggered the gap, if applicable

question.description: Research question that would fill the gap

suggested_deer_query.description: Optional pre-formatted deer-query question for direct dispatch
